summary: Completed end-to-end testing of HTML/MHTML Viewer app (both backend and frontend). All 18 backend pytest tests passed (100%) covering file upload (HTML & MHTML), paste, list, get content, delete, and bookmarks CRUD + cascade delete. Frontend Playwright flow validated: app loads, sidebar tabs switch, paste preview + save & render, file appears in list, file click loads content into iframe, viewport toggle (desktop/mobile) works, refresh & bookmark buttons functional, bookmark appears in Bookmarks tab and clicking loads it, delete file & remove bookmark work, dropzone file upload via input works. No critical bugs found.

issues: Iframe sandbox uses both allow-scripts and allow-same-origin which prints a console warning ('iframe ... can escape its sandboxing'). Functional but reduces security; consider dropping allow-same-origin since the iframe uses srcDoc.

Empty state references an external image at static.prod-images.emergentagent.com that returned a 522 status during testing (network log). The image is decorative so the page still renders fine, but the broken background asset could degrade UX.

action_items: (Optional/Low) Consider removing allow-same-origin from iframe sandbox in Renderer.jsx since srcDoc is used.
(Optional/Low) Verify the empty-state background image URL is reachable, or self-host it; it returned HTTP 522 during testing.
(Optional) Add a small confirmation dialog before deleting files/bookmarks (currently deletion is immediate).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan.

logger is referenced in parse_mhtml (line 87) BEFORE it's defined (line 207). If an MHTML parse error occurs, this will raise NameError. Move logging setup above parse_mhtml or use module-level logger init at top of file.

Bookmarks 'duplicate' semantics: POST /api/bookmarks silently returns existing bookmark for the same file_id rather than creating a new one, regardless of provided name/note. This may be intentional but could surprise API consumers; consider returning 409 or allowing multiple bookmarks per file.
PasteInput.name defaults to 'Untitled' but paste endpoint may store as 'Untitled.html'; the truthy check on line 126 means an explicit empty string '' would fallback to 'Untitled.html' which is fine.
Upload endpoint accepts ANY file extension and stores as HTML (line 111-113 fallback). Consider validating extension and rejecting non-html/mhtml uploads with 400.
test_credentials: N/A - no authentication in this app
seed_data_creation: Test files/bookmarks created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up at end of pytest run and Playwright flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 8 endpoints incl. MHTML parsing and cascade delete. Frontend uses data-testid for all interactive elements (tab-files, tab-bookmarks, tab-paste, paste-name-input, paste-textarea, render-paste-btn, save-paste-btn, file-item-{id}, delete-file-{id}, bookmark-item-{id}, remove-bookmark-{id}, toolbar buttons viewport-desktop-btn, viewport-mobile-btn, refresh-btn, fullscreen-btn, bookmark-btn, file-input, folder-input, file-dropzone). No auth required. App URL: https://html-display-engine.preview.emergentagent.com
